author: doll-agent
content: Created tests/api_proof.rs for all 5 utility crates: ferrolearn-core (7 tests covering Backend, Dataset, FerroError, introspection traits, Pipeline, StreamingFitter, TypedPipeline, Predict/Transform/FitTransform), ferrolearn-datasets (5 tests covering 7 toy loaders + 15 generators including the 7 added in #318), ferrolearn-sparse (4 tests covering CSR/CSC/COO + new helpers), ferrolearn-numerical (6 tests covering 7 distributions + integrate + interpolate + optimize + sparse_eig + sparse_graph), ferrolearn-io (5 tests covering envelope + JSON round-trips + corruption rejection). Also fixed stale trybuild snapshot for predict_unfitted_kmeans (pre-existing breakage from cluster audit's fit_predict addition).
